benchmark.adr_definition: (accommodation rate + mandatory pppn levies) / nights, RACK basis

inclusion: Fully inclusive (all meals, drinks incl. house alcohol, 2 daily game drives, lodge activities) — meets/exceeds benchmark

months.config: Luxury Suite (2 guest(s))
assumptions: Single flat season for the whole 2025/26 validity; dates outside it reuse it.
Conservation levy R620 pppn is the 2025 figure, assumed to hold.
No guests under 12 (exclusive use not assumed) → such parties are infeasible.
Honeymoon 50%-off needs proof of marriage (soft) and is never auto-applied.
Per-vehicle gate levy excluded (fly-in assumption).
